So everyone, so I wanted to make the next three quick videos about customer service. So what do you do if a customer wants to refund, change the flavor, delay payment, or change the card info, whatever? What you should do is tell them to, or they can email support at prestigelabs.com. And depending on when you're watching this video, if it has already released to all of legacy, then they will also be able to chat in at prestigelabs.com. But if it has not, it will be their primary options of doing anything so that they get the exceptional customer service.
